name: greenfield
description: Greenfield kit: a PRD/TDD/ADR design-doc pipeline with phase-gate PRs. /tdd-author decides how many TDDs a PRD change needs (git-diff + coverage) and recommends ADR actions; /implement builds all ready TDDs unattended in detached processes, flips them to implemented, and opens PRs (never merges). Includes subagent-based review, a toolchain bootstrap skill, and a format+lint hook for JS/TS, Python, Rust, and Go.
